place: Lipa Noi, Ko Samui District, Surat Thani, Thailand
title: Beachfront Waterfall-Pool Villa, Lipa Noi, Koh Samui
blurb: A five-bedroom beachfront villa of around 2,100 m² at Lipa Noi, west-coast Koh Samui, blending traditional Ayutthaya architecture with modern comforts. The 18-metre pool with waterfalls and a kids’ shallow zone is the focal point, backed by an outdoor jacuzzi, sauna, gym and direct beach access. Fully staffed with a private chef; flexible for three to five bedrooms.
detail:
A family-friendly beachfront villa on the leafy, serene west coast of Koh Samui at Lipa Noi, this is modern living wrapped in traditional Ayutthaya architecture — bright, roomy and beautifully appointed, with large French doors and high-vaulted cathedral windows drawing in light and views of the manicured lawns and pool. Around 2,100 m², it sleeps up to ten across five suites, taken flexibly as three to five bedrooms.

The focal point is an 18-metre pool with waterfalls, with a shallow zone for little guests and sun loungers under parasols. Start the day with a workout in the gym, a soak in the outdoor jacuzzi, a session in the sauna or an in-villa spa treatment, then dine on chef-prepared meals in an alfresco setting with direct access to the beach. Inside, a Smart TV, BOSE sound system, outdoor speakers and Mahjong and board games keep every generation happy.

The fully furnished kitchen is comprehensive, with an indoor 12-seat dining table and an outdoor 10-seater for family meals. All five bedrooms are immaculately designed and en-suite, several with rain showers and three with bathtubs overlooking the gardens; the first-level master features a four-poster king bed and a private balcony with sunset views. Fully staffed with a private chef, daily breakfast and housekeeping, plus private parking and Wi-Fi throughout.
